# Graphify

All graph-related assets for KnowledgeBase are stored here.

## Structure

- `docs/` Graphify knowledge and integration guidance
- `output/` generated local graph artifacts
- `viewer/` local browser viewer assets

## Commands

- `pnpm kb:graphify:sync` generate local graph output
- `pnpm kb:graphify:status` print local graph summary
- `pnpm kb:graphify:view` run local graph viewer
- `pnpm kb:graphify:start` sync graph and start viewer
- `pnpm kb:graphify:open` open viewer in default browser

## Generated files

- `KnowledgeBase/Graphify/output/local-graph.json`
- `KnowledgeBase/Graphify/output/local-graph.md`
